114typedef struct _media {
115 /* ============================================================================
116 ============================== Public members ============================== */
117
125 void (*get_version)(const struct _media *self, uint32_t *major, uint32_t *minor, uint32_t *patch);
126
133 int (*get_streams)(const struct _media *self, const streams_t **streams);
134
141 int (*get_controls)(const struct _media *self, const controls_t **controls);
142
149 int (*about)(const struct _media *self, const properties_t **properties);
150
165 int (*query_stream_capabilities)(const struct _media *self, const char *name, capabilities_t **caps);
166
172 media_error_t (*get_last_error)(const struct _media *self);
173
174 /* =============================================================================
175 ============================== Private members ============================== */
176
182 int (*do_initialize)(const struct _media *self);
183
189 int (*do_release)(const struct _media *self);
190
196 int (*do_prepare)(const struct _media *self);
197
203 int (*do_finalize)(const struct _media *self);
204
211 int (*do_get_control)(const struct _media *self, const char *const name, value_t *value);
212
219 int (*do_set_control)(const struct _media *self, const char *name, const value_t value);
220
228 int (*do_get_stream_capabilities)(const struct _media *self, const char *const name, const capabilities_t **caps);
229
236 int (*do_set_stream_capabilities)(const struct _media *self, const char *const name, const capabilities_t *caps);
237
246 int (*do_query_memory_allocation)(const struct _media *self, const char *const name, properties_t **constraints);
247
253 int (*set_state)(const struct _media *self, media_state_t state);
254
255 media_state_t state;
256 media_state_transition_t state_transition;
258} media_t;
259
261static inline int set_state(media_t *self, media_state_t state) {
262 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
263 if (self != NULL) {
264 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_STATE;
265 media_state_t current = self->state;
266 media_state_transition_t transition = MEDIA_STATE_TRANSITION_NONE;
267 bool update = false;
268
269 if (current == state) {
270 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_NONE;
271 } else if ((current == MEDIA_STATE_NULL) && (state == MEDIA_STATE_INITIALIZED)) {
272 transition = MEDIA_STATE_TRANSITION_NULL_TO_INITIALIZED;
273 update = true;
274 } else if ((current == MEDIA_STATE_INITIALIZED) && (state == MEDIA_STATE_PREPARED)) {
275 transition = MEDIA_STATE_TRANSITION_INITIALIZED_TO_PREPARED;
276 update = true;
277 } else if ((current == MEDIA_STATE_PREPARED) && (state == MEDIA_STATE_STREAMING)) {
278 transition = MEDIA_STATE_TRANSITION_PREPARED_TO_STREAMING;
279 update = true;
280 } else if ((current == MEDIA_STATE_STREAMING) && (state == MEDIA_STATE_PREPARED)) {
281 transition = MEDIA_STATE_TRANSITION_STREAMING_TO_PREPARED;
282 update = true;
283 } else if ((current == MEDIA_STATE_PREPARED) && (state == MEDIA_STATE_INITIALIZED)) {
284 transition = MEDIA_STATE_TRANSITION_PREPARED_TO_INITIALIZED;
285 update = true;
286 } else if ((current == MEDIA_STATE_INITIALIZED) && (state == MEDIA_STATE_NULL)) {
287 transition = MEDIA_STATE_TRANSITION_INITIALIZED_TO_NULL;
288 update = true;
289 } else {
290 /* Invalid transition - ret remains MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_STATE */
291 }
292
293 if (update) {
294 self->state = state;
295 self->state_transition = transition;
296 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_NONE;
297 }
298 }
299 return ret;
300}
301
303
318static inline int media_get_state(const media_t *self, media_state_t *state) {
319 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
320 if ((self != NULL) && (state != NULL)) {
321 *state = self->state;
322 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_NONE;
323 }
324 return ret;
325}
326
351static inline int media_initialize(media_t *self) {
352 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
353 if (self != NULL) {
354 media_state_t state;
355 int state_ret = media_get_state(self, &state);
356 if (state_ret != MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
357 ret = state_ret;
358 } else if ((self->do_initialize == NULL) || (self->do_release == NULL) || (self->do_prepare == NULL) ||
359 (self->do_finalize == NULL) || (self->get_streams == NULL) || (self->get_controls == NULL) ||
360 (self->about == NULL) || (self->query_stream_capabilities == NULL) ||
361 (self->get_last_error == NULL) || (self->do_get_control == NULL) || (self->do_set_control == NULL) ||
362 (self->do_get_stream_capabilities == NULL) || (self->do_set_stream_capabilities == NULL) ||
363 (self->do_query_memory_allocation == NULL)) {
364 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
365 } else {
366 ret = self->do_initialize(self);
367 if (ret == MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
368 (void)set_state(self, MEDIA_STATE_INITIALIZED);
369 }
370 }
371 }
372 return ret;
373}
374
398static inline int media_release(media_t *self) {
399 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
400 if (self != NULL) {
401 media_state_t state;
402 int state_ret = media_get_state(self, &state);
403 if (state_ret != MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
404 ret = state_ret;
405 } else if (self->do_release == NULL) {
406 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
407 } else {
408 ret = self->do_release(self);
409 if (ret == MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
410 (void)set_state(self, MEDIA_STATE_NULL);
411 }
412 }
413 }
414 return ret;
415}
416
450static inline int media_prepare(media_t *self) {
451 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
452 if (self != NULL) {
453 media_state_t state;
454 int state_ret = media_get_state(self, &state);
455 if (state_ret != MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
456 ret = state_ret;
457 } else if (self->do_prepare == NULL) {
458 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
459 } else {
460 ret = self->do_prepare(self);
461 if (ret == MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
462 ret = set_state(self, MEDIA_STATE_PREPARED);
463 }
464 }
465 }
466 return ret;
467}
468
496static inline int media_finalize(media_t *self) {
497 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
498 if (self != NULL) {
499 media_state_t state;
500 int state_ret = media_get_state(self, &state);
501 if (state_ret != MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
502 ret = state_ret;
503 } else if (self->do_finalize == NULL) {
504 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
505 } else {
506 ret = self->do_finalize(self);
507 if (ret == MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
508 (void)set_state(self, MEDIA_STATE_INITIALIZED);
509 }
510 }
511 }
512 return ret;
513}
514
525static inline void media_get_version(const media_t *self, uint32_t *major, uint32_t *minor, uint32_t *patch) {
526 self->get_version(self, major, minor, patch);
527}
528
548static inline int media_get_streams(const media_t *self, const streams_t **streams) {
549 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
550 if ((self != NULL) && (streams != NULL)) {
551 if (self->get_streams == NULL) {
552 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
553 } else {
554 ret = self->get_streams(self, streams);
555 }
556 }
557 return ret;
558}
559
579static inline int media_get_stream_capabilities(const media_t *self, const char *const name,
580 const capabilities_t **caps) {
581 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
582 if ((self != NULL) && (name != NULL) && (caps != NULL)) {
583 if (self->do_get_stream_capabilities == NULL) {
584 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
585 } else {
586 ret = self->do_get_stream_capabilities(self, name, caps);
587 }
588 }
589 return ret;
590}
591
610static inline int media_set_stream_capabilities(const media_t *self, const char *const name,
611 const capabilities_t *caps) {
612 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
613 if ((self != NULL) && (name != NULL) && (caps != NULL)) {
614 if (self->do_set_stream_capabilities == NULL) {
615 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
616 } else {
617 ret = self->do_set_stream_capabilities(self, name, caps);
618 }
619 }
620 return ret;
621}
622
643static inline int media_get_controls(const media_t *self, const controls_t **controls) {
644 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
645 if ((self != NULL) && (controls != NULL)) {
646 if (self->get_controls == NULL) {
647 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
648 } else {
649 ret = self->get_controls(self, controls);
650 }
651 }
652 return ret;
653}
654
675static inline int media_get_control(const media_t *self, const char *const name, value_t *value) {
676 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
677 if ((self != NULL) && (name != NULL) && (value != NULL)) {
678 if (self->do_get_control == NULL) {
679 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
680 } else {
681 ret = self->do_get_control(self, name, value);
682 if ((ret == MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) && (value->tid == VTID_INVALID)) {
683 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_NOT_FOUND;
684 }
685 }
686 }
687 return ret;
688}
689
723static inline int media_set_control(const media_t *self, const char *name, const value_t value) {
724 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
725 if ((self != NULL) && (name != NULL)) {
726 if ((self->do_set_control == NULL) || (self->get_controls == NULL)) {
727 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
728 } else if (value.tid == VTID_INVALID) {
729 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
730 } else {
731 const controls_t *controls = NULL;
732 int ctrl_ret = self->get_controls(self, &controls);
733 if (ctrl_ret != MEDIA_ERROR_NONE) {
734 ret = ctrl_ret;
735 } else {
736 const control_t *ctrl = controls_find(controls, name);
737 if (ctrl == NULL) {
738 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_NOT_FOUND;
739 } else if (((ctrl->flags & CTRL_FLAGS_STATIC) != 0u) &&
740 (self->state >= MEDIA_STATE_PREPARED)) {
741 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_STATE;
742 } else {
743 ret = self->do_set_control(self, name, value);
744 }
745 }
746 }
747 }
748 return ret;
749}
750
773static inline int media_about(const media_t *self, const properties_t **properties) {
774 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
775 if ((self != NULL) && (properties != NULL)) {
776 if (self->about == NULL) {
777 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
778 } else {
779 ret = self->about(self, properties);
780 }
781 }
782 return ret;
783}
784
807static inline int media_query_stream_capabilities(const media_t *self, const char *name, capabilities_t **caps) {
808 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
809 if ((self != NULL) && (name != NULL) && (caps != NULL)) {
810 if (self->query_stream_capabilities == NULL) {
811 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
812 } else {
813 ret = self->query_stream_capabilities(self, name, caps);
814 }
815 }
816 return ret;
817}
818
849static inline int media_query_memory_allocation(const media_t *self, const char *name, properties_t **constraints) {
850 int ret = MEDIA_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER;
851 if ((self != NULL) && (name != NULL) && (constraints != NULL)) {
852 if (self->do_query_memory_allocation == NULL) {
853 ret = MEDIA_ERROR_UNIMPLEMENTED;
854 } else {
855 ret = self->do_query_memory_allocation(self, name, constraints);
856 }
857 }
858 return ret;
859}
860
874static inline void media_inspect(const media_t *self, int (*print_func)(const char *, ...)) {
875 if (self == NULL) {
876 (void)print_func("Invalid media instance.\n");
877 } else {
878 // Print about information
879 const properties_t *properties;
880 if (self->about(self, &properties) == 0) {
881 (void)print_func("About:\n ");
882 properties_inspect(properties, print_func, "\t");
883 } else {
884 (void)print_func("Failed to get about information.\n");
885 }
886
887 // Print streams
888 const streams_t *streams;
889 if (self->get_streams(self, &streams) == 0) {
890 streams_inspect(streams, print_func);
891 } else {
892 (void)print_func("Failed to get stream list.\n");
893 }
894
895 // Print controls
896 const controls_t *controls;
897 if (self->get_controls(self, &controls) == 0) {
898 controls_inspect(controls, print_func);
899 } else {
900 (void)print_func("Failed to get control list.\n");
901 }
902 }
903}
904
905#ifdef __cplusplus
906}
907#endif
